title: Icona Bay - 6x4 Picture Frames - White, 6 Pack - Sturdy Engineered Wood Photo Frames 6 x 4 - Sleek Design, Table Top or Wall Mount - Exclusives Collection
features: MODERN DESIGN - Icona Bay's picture frames are sophisticated, streamlined design that works with all types of décor; High-tier, high-quality materials used throughout; Perfect for the home, office or as great gifts

INCLUDES - 6 White frames with a matte finish; Fits standard 6 by 4 inch (15 x 10 cm) pictures or prints; Opening reveals 5.5 x 3.5 inches / 13.9 x 8.9 centimetres image; MDF moulding and crystal clear plastic sheet covers for image protection

WALL MOUNT or TABLE TOP - Includes D-ring hooks to easily hang artwork or photographs in either portrait or landscape orientation; Versatile kickstand easel lets you display either horizontally or vertically

VARIETY AVAILABLE - The Exclusives Collection by Icona Bay sells in various colours, sizes and quantities: Alder Grey, Black, Hickory Brown, Grey, Pure White, Red, Vanta Black, White; 10x15, 13x18, 20x25, 22x28, 28x36 cm & Mixed-Size Set; 1-pack, 3-pack, 6-pack, 10-pack (mixed sizes), 12-pack
SECURE PACKAGING - Rest assured that your picture frames will arrive safely thanks to Icona Bay's especially safe packaging
